summary: Diff updates several frontend pages/components (adds Version 11 label, improves backend connection error UI, changes navigation to use timestamp IDs), updates LIVE_URL.md, and modifies backend/main.mo significantly (data model, ingredient/category lists, and new category filtering). There is no evidence of an actual production deployment trigger/completion or of post-deploy verification being performed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Publish the latest build (Version 11) to production so the end-user-facing live app is updated, and confirm the production frontend loads without backend connectivity error.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows code/documentation changes; it does not include any deployment configuration, CI/CD trigger, release artifact, or other evidence that a production deployment was executed and completed successfully or that the live app was confirmed to load without connectivity errors.
evidence: file-diff summary: only source/documentation files modified; no deployment-related files shown

missing_requirements.requirement: After publishing Version 11, verify the production site against frontend/PRODUCTION_SMOKE_TEST.md (Daily Entry buttons enabled and functional; Clear Form resets Balance Date; Copy for Vendor validation and copy; Save Record persists and appears in History and opens in Record Details).
missing_requirements.reason: While the checklist file exists/was modified (truncated view) and related UI logic appears implemented, the diff contains no evidence of performing or recording the production verification itself (no test run output, sign-off, or results).
evidence: file-diff summary: no verification artifacts/logs included

hallucinated_features.description: Backend changes the predefined category set beyond the three defined categories (adds e.g., "Spices" and "Beverages") and adds a getCategoriesByType API.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists as a non-goal: changing the predefined ingredient list, categories, or record format as part of this publish step. Adding new categories and a new category-filtering API is a product change not requested for publishing Version 11.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend modifies the predefined ingredient list (e.g., adds "Dahi").
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goal prohibits changing the predefined ingredient list as part of the publish step; the diff shows ingredient list changes in backend/main.mo.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend appears to change the daily record data model/record format (introduces Meal/Ingredient/DailyRecord with meals/timestamp) which may diverge from the existing frontend 'entries' based record structure.
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goal prohibits changing the record format as part of this publish step; the backend diff shows a different DailyRecord structure (meals/timestamp) and addDailyRecord signature that does not match the frontend usage shown in the diff summary (which passes 'entries').
evidence: backend/main.mo (type DailyRecord = { meals : [Meal]; timestamp : Timestamp; }, addDailyRecord(meals, timestamp))
